title: stenostelma periglossoides
intro: Stenostelma periglossoides, also known as the "Golden Flower", is a plant species belonging to the Apocynaceae family. It is a perennial herb native to the tropical regions of Africa. The medicinal properties of Stenostelma periglossoides lie in its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its various health benefits. Traditionally, the plant is used to prepare herbal infusions and decoctions, often used to treat fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems, and is also used as a natural remedy for wound healing and skin conditions.
